requestBody: {"QUERIES":[{"QUERY_ID":"R1-R1","ROLES":["R","R"],"SELECT":"newTag('R1-R1') as query_id, Avg(`response_duration`) AS `响应时延`, Percentile(`response_duration`,0.75) AS `P75 响应时延`, Percentile(`response_duration`,0.9) AS `P90 响应时延`, Percentile(`response_duration`,0.99) AS `P99 响应时延`, node_type('_0') AS `client_node_type`, -42 AS `client_icon_id`, -42 AS `server_icon_id`, newTag('_0') AS `_0`, node_type('_1') AS `server_node_type`, newTag('_1') AS `_1`","TAGS":["node_type('_0') AS `client_node_type`","-42 AS `client_icon_id`","-42 AS `server_icon_id`","newTag('_0') AS `_0`","node_type('_1') AS `server_node_type`","newTag('_1') AS `_1`"],"CTAGS":["node_type('_0') AS `client_node_type`","-42 AS `client_icon_id`","newTag('_0') AS `_0`"],"STAGS":["node_type('_1') AS `server_node_type`","-42 AS `server_icon_id`","newTag('_1') AS `_1`"],"METRICS":["Avg(`response_duration`) AS `响应时延`","Percentile(`response_duration`,0.75) AS `P75 响应时延`","Percentile(`response_duration`,0.9) AS `P90 响应时延`","Percentile(`response_duration`,0.99) AS `P99 响应时延`"],"GROUP_BY":"_0, `client_node_type`, _1, `server_node_type`"}],"TABLE":"l7_flow_log","DATABASE":"flow_log","SORT":{"ORDER_BY":"响应时延","SORTED_BY":"DESC"},"INCLUDE_HISTORY":true,"TOP":"5","window_size":1,"fill":"null","interval":2,"time_start":1784626734,"time_end":1784627634}
